title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners - Spotlight
text: The 83rd Golden Globes ceremony, hosted by comedian Nikki Glaser in Los Angeles, celebrated outstanding achievements in film and television. Paul Thomas Anderson's One Battle After Another dominated film categories with four awards, including Best Film Musical or Comedy and Best Director. Chloé Zhao's Hamnet secured the Best Film Drama prize, while Sinners and The Secret Agent also earned multiple wins. Individual winners included Jessie Buckley for Best Female Actor Drama for Hamnet and Timothée Chalamet for Best Male Actor Musical or Comedy for Marty Supreme. Netflix's Adolescence led television with four victories. The show featured three members among its honorees: Stephen Graham, Erin Doherty, and Owen Cooper, with Cooper becoming the second youngest Golden Globe winner.
